headline: BNP Paribas Initiates Coverage On Trane Technologies with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $550
summary: BNP Paribas  analyst Andrew Buscaglia   initiates coverage on Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $550.
